description: Notification system completion + Dashboard enhancement (report download, richer data display) + Single persona integration guide
steps: 1. In dashboard/app.py: (a) Add POST /api/notifications/test endpoint that accepts {channel: 'telegram'|'slack'|'wechat'|'lark'} and dispatches test message via corresponding bot module (from augur.bots.telegram_bot, etc). Handle missing config gracefully. (b) Add POST /api/notifications/config endpoint that saves notification config to config/notifications.yaml (create config/ dir if needed). (c) Add GET /api/notifications/config to read saved notification config.

2. In dashboard/templates/signals.html: Add 'Alert Threshold' section - user can set score threshold (e.g. >8) and select notification channel. Save to localStorage and/or config/notifications.yaml via API. Display a small form: threshold slider (1-10), channel selector, save button.

3. In dashboard/templates/stocks.html (or wherever report is displayed): Add a 'Download Report' button that: (a) fetches /api/report/{ticker}, (b) creates a Blob from the markdown text, (c) triggers a browser download as {TICKER}_augur_report_{date}.md file. Also add a 'Copy to Clipboard' button for the report markdown.

4. Create docs/single-persona-integration.md (if not exists, enhance existing): A comprehensive guide on how to integrate a single Augur persona agent into external systems (Hermes Agent, Open Claw, custom apps). Include: MCP server config, direct Python API usage, REST API single-persona endpoint, example configs for Claude Desktop / Hermes / Open Claw. Provide both Chinese and English.

5. Ensure the notification test endpoint works by importing from augur.bots modules (telegram_bot.py, slack_bot.py, etc) - these modules already exist. Wrap in try/except for graceful degradation if bot dependencies are not installed.
acceptance_criteria: Signals page has alert threshold UI with save capability
Report page has Download and Copy buttons that work
docs/single-persona-integration.md exists with comprehensive integration guide
verification: python -c "from dashboard.app import app; print('notification endpoints OK')"
findings: All 448 tests pass. stocks.html already had download/copy buttons in the report toolbar - updated filename format to include date. signals.html got the alert threshold UI. Integration guide enhanced with Python API, REST API, MCP config for Claude Desktop, and Open Claw wrapper examples in both Chinese and English.
